channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Top Maryland Democrat defies Jeffries on mid-cycle redistricting push to boot state's lone Republican
item.description: A leading Maryland Democrat is resisting House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffriesâ push to redraw the stateâs congressional map, exposing a rift over mid...

item.title: Giving Equal Time To the Facts about Colbert, the FCC, Censorship, and Broadcasting Standards

item.description: A federal judge blocked Trump deportation policies, ruling government's "worst of the worst" claim about detained migrants is inaccurate and overly br...

item.title: Gov Wes Moore stands by account of grandfather's interaction with KKK amid scrutiny: 'Hurtful and offensive'
item.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore defends family KKK story after Washington Free Beacon report questions details about grandfather fleeing South Carolina threat...

item.title: West Virginia sues Apple, accuses tech giant of letting iCloud become hub for child sexual abuse material
item.description: West Virginia becomes first state to sue Apple over allegations the tech giant allows predators to hide child abuse material in iCloud storage systems...

item.title: Things That Were Never on My Bingo Card: RFK Jr. Crushing the Weights With Kid Rock for Health Message

item.description: Sen. Rick Scott, R-Fla., said former Prince Andrew should "absolutely" stand trial in the U.S. if he is found to have broken American laws following h...
